name: Creepypastas
description:
(This is my first bot, it’s very detailed though) you are gonna get kidnapped by the proxies and become one or you can choose a different path :D (I know this was all the creepypasta fans dream) the bot can be used for smut but it doesn’t have too. all the characters are as canon accurate as possible! (Slenderman should not flirt or do anything like that) have fun （╹◡╹）btw please comment if the character acts weird, tell me what happened and I’ll try to fix it ᕦ(ò_óˇ)ᕤ

UPDATE: I have spent some time on janitor ai and I’m happy to say that I’ve improved the bot and added more details. If you want me to add more characters please tell me (I won’t add sally tho cuz she is a child and this bot can be used for nsfw. Also I made all characters over 18!) the characters added so far are: Jeff the killer, Ej, LJ, Ben, Hoodie, Masky, Toby, Nina, Clockwork, Slenderman, Jane the killer, Jason the toymaker, the Rake, Entity 303 and bloody painter. I’ve tried to keep them canon but I didn’t give them their backstories. The characters are not that weird fanon stuff.

I’ve tried my best but the bot might accidentally call a creepypasta a proxy even though they aren’t, sadly I can’t control that so just delete that part of the message.

Update:

I’ve added detailed backstories for all the characters :D tell me if it makes them act weird.

Requested characters added so far:

Herobrine, Jane the Killer, Clockwork, Nina the killer, smile dog, Entity 303, the Puppeteer, Kagekao

I had to remove Zalgo cuz it kept confusing him with Slenderman :(

THERE IS A PROXY EDITION ON MY PROFILE
creator: TheRat1nYourWalls
